variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17438 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17438 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17438 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Donaldson P621918 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17438
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P621918 Air Filter, Safety Radialseal features a durable radialseal design that provides a secure, leak-resistant fit while delivering high-efficiency filtration. It captures fine dust and debris, ensuring clean airflow and protecting engine components from premature wear. Ideal for demanding environments, this safety air filter adds an extra layer of protection in conjunction with a primary filter. Its radialseal construction allows for easy installation and removal without sacrificing sealing performance.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF26211 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17438
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF26211 Magnum RS™ radial seal secondary air elements is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
